headline: Does Amex’s Capital Return And Apple Pay Push Redefine The Bull Case For American Express (AXP)?
summary: In recent weeks, American Express has reinforced investor confidence by confirming a higher dividend from Q1 2026, maintaining a 2.5% Stress Capital Buffer through 2027, and expanding Membership Rewards redemptions into Apple Pay following solid Q1 results and resilience in Fed stress tests. At the same time, growing uptake of premium cards among younger customers and richer loyalty features are tightening the link between American Express’s brand, its closed-loop model, and future fee-based...

headline: American Express (AXP) Launches Restaurant Academy With Resy And NRAEF
summary: American Express (NYSE:AXP) has launched the Restaurant Academy, a leadership program for U.S. restaurant owners and managers. The initiative is being rolled out in partnership with Resy and the National Restaurant Association Educational Foundation. The program focuses on training, mentorship, and operational skills for small and independent restaurant operators. American Express enters this launch with its stock at $351.96 and a one-year return of 8.4%. The company has also recorded a...
